correct_answer: Social media revolutionized communication in the digital age.
retrieved_context: SOCIAL MEDIA Snapchat is included under the umbrella of social media platforms, known for its unique approach to messaging and content sharing SNAPCHAT. SOCIAL MEDIA Social media has changed the way people connect, share information, and interact, both positively by empowering voices and negatively by promoting shallow interactions COMMUNICATION. SOCIAL MEDIA Social media platforms have facilitated the rise of citizen journalism by allowing users to share news and information instantly, broadening the scope of who can disseminate news CITIZEN JOURNALISM. TWITTER Twitter, in particular, has been instrumental in the spread of citizen journalism, providing a platform for real-time news sharing and discussions CITIZEN JOURNALISM. SOCIAL MEDIA Facebook is one of the platforms encompassed by the broader term social media FACEBOOK. SOCIAL MEDIA Instagram is a key player in the social media landscape, affecting how people share and consume visual content INSTAGRAM. SOCIAL MEDIA Social media platforms have been criticized for the rise of misinformation and fake news, making it hard to discern fact from fiction MISINFORMATION. SOCIAL MEDIA Twitter is part of the social media ecosystem, contributing to its impact on communication and information sharing TWITTER. TWITTER Twitter, in particular, has been instrumental in the spread of citizen journalism, providing a platform for real-time news sharing and discussions CITIZEN JOURNALISM.
